= Contents =
  - [[#NETWORKING|NETWORKING]]
    - [[#NETWORKING#tcp/ip|tcp/ip]]
      - [[#NETWORKING#tcp/ip#iptables|iptables]]
        - [[#NETWORKING#tcp/ip#iptables#show nat table|show nat table]]
        - [[#NETWORKING#tcp/ip#iptables#port forwarding|port forwarding]]
      - [[#NETWORKING#tcp/ip#configuration|configuration]]
        - [[#NETWORKING#tcp/ip#configuration#ip address aliasing|ip address aliasing]]

= NETWORKING =

== tcp/ip ==

=== iptables ===

==== show nat table ====
{{{
   iptables -n -t nat -L --line-number
 }}}
==== port forwarding ====
{{{
   iptables -t nat -A PREROUTING -p tcp --dport $PORT -j DNAT --to-destination $ADDRESS:$PORT
 }}}

=== configuration ===

==== ip address aliasing ====
CentOS::
  :: `/etc/sysconfig/network-scripts`
  :: `cp ifcfg-ethX icfg-ethX:N`
  
  :: necessary fields in alias interface are:
  {{{
  DEVICE="ethX:N"
  BOOTPROTO=static
  ONBOOT=yes
  IPADDR=...
  NETMASK=...
  GATEWAY=...
  }}}
  :: `/etc/init.d/network restart`
